name: grimoire
description: A grimoire of Agent Skills that help the R-Ladies community and global team follow the R-Ladies guide — brand and voice, blogging, translation, social media, abstract review, chapters and events, the website, and pre-human-review checks.

plugins.name: grimoire
plugins.description: A grimoire of composing skills for R-Ladies community and global-team work, distilled from guide.rladies.org.
